hero.subtitle: Our own atelier in Ukraine. Bespoke jewellery made to order — from your idea, a photo, or pure inspiration.

create.title: Create your own piece
create.subtitle: Four steps from a first idea to a piece that exists nowhere else
create.step1Desc: Send us your idea or a photo reference of the piece you want.
create.step2Desc: We choose the metal (585/750) and stone — natural or lab-grown diamond.
create.step3Desc: We calculate an individual price for your exact piece.
create.step4Desc: We craft the piece at our own production and deliver it to you.

works.title: Made by our own hands
works.subtitle: A few pieces from our atelier — each born from a client's idea

can.title: What we can do
can.item1: A piece from your photo or idea
can.item2: In the style of renowned jewelry houses
can.item3: Melting your old gold into a new piece
can.item4: Natural and lab-grown diamonds with certificates

trust.title: Our own atelier. Impeccable quality. Experience.
trust.subtitle: We control every step — from the first sketch to the final setting.

reviews.title: What clients say
reviews.subtitle: Stories from those who trusted us with their dream

finalCta.title: Let's create the jewelry of your dreams
finalCta.subtitle: Leave a request — we'll calculate the price individually and get back to you.

catalog.title: Catalog
catalog.intro: Every piece is born from a client's idea and crafted at our own atelier. Choose the one that speaks to you — or commission your own.
catalog.empty: No pieces yet. Please check back soon.

static.shipping: Delivery across Ukraine and all of Europe. Timing and cost are agreed individually after you place a request.
static.packaging: Every piece arrives in branded Dream Gold gift packaging.
care: Keep away from children — small parts and chains can be hazardous.
Handle with care — put pieces on and take them off slowly.
Do not wear during sleep, sport, or active pursuits.
Protect from impacts and chemicals; store each piece separately in a soft pouch.
